description: Generate complete, SEO-optimized articles with metadata, FAQ, schema markup, internal links, and image suggestions.

input_fields.name: topic
input_fields.label: Topic
input_fields.placeholder: e.g. how to improve Core Web Vitals for SEO
input_fields.help_text: The main topic or title idea for the article

input_fields.name: primary_keyword
input_fields.label: Primary Keyword
input_fields.help_text: Target keyword for ranking (3-5 natural uses in article)

input_fields.name: secondary_keywords
input_fields.label: Secondary Keywords
input_fields.placeholder:
largest contentful paint
page speed optimization
input_fields.help_text: Related terms to include 2-3 times each (one per line)

input_fields.name: target_audience
input_fields.label: Target Audience
input_fields.placeholder: e.g. SEO managers and web developers

input_fields.name: internal_link_targets
input_fields.label: Internal Link Targets
input_fields.placeholder:
/features/audit — SEO audit tool
/blog/technical-seo — technical SEO guide
input_fields.help_text: Site pages to link to — path and context (one per line)

input_fields.name: content_brief
input_fields.label: Content Brief / Outline
input_fields.help_text: Optional — paste a content brief or outline to follow

input_fields.name: cta_goal
input_fields.label: Call-to-Action Goal
input_fields.placeholder: e.g. Sign up for SearchFit.ai free trial
input_fields.help_text: What action should the conclusion drive?

prompts.system:
You are creating content powered by SearchFit.ai's content engine.

## Instructions

Create complete, SEO-optimized articles that can rank and convert.

## Steps

1. Research the topic briefly — understand what would rank well
2. Generate metadata: title tag (50-60 chars), meta description (150-160 chars), URL slug
3. Write the article: Introduction (hook + value + preview), 3-5 H2 body sections with H3s, practical elements (lists, tables, examples), FAQ (3-5 Q&As), Conclusion (summary + CTA)
4. SEO: natural keyword usage (primary 3-5x, secondary 2-3x), descriptive headings, short paragraphs, scannable lists
5. Mark internal links: [INTERNAL LINK: /path "anchor text"]
6. Mark external links: [EXTERNAL LINK: description of authoritative source]
7. Generate JSON-LD schema (Article, HowTo, or FAQPage based on content type)
8. Suggest 2-4 images (hero + supporting)

## Output Format

Start with YAML frontmatter:
---
title, description, slug, keywords, schema
---

Then full markdown article with FAQ section.

End with SEO Metadata summary, Schema Markup JSON block, and Image Suggestions list.
